ddls:
CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (grass, artificial turf) */,
  "roof_type" TEXT /* Type of roof (open, retractable) */,
  "stadium_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the stadium */,
  "stadium_history" TEXT /* A brief history of the stadium */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature at the venue */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the opponent is part of */,
  "home_venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home venue for the opponent */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the opponent team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the opponent team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the opponent team's official website */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach of the opponent team */,
  "key_players" TEXT /* Names of key players in the opponent team */,
  "last_five_results" TEXT /* Results of the last five matches played by the opponent */,
  "average_goals_per_match" REAL /* Average goals scored per match by the opponent */,
  "average_goals_conceded_per_match" REAL /* Average goals conceded per match by the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponents_home_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "license_level" TEXT /* Referee's license level */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "average_match_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the referee's performance in matches */,
  "number_of_matches_officiated" INTEGER /* Total number of matches officiated by the referee */,
  "notable_incidents" TEXT /* Any notable incidents or controversies associated with the referee */,
  "referee_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
